title: My Automation, and how i'd like to expand.
author: No_Page5992
selftext:
Hey all!

I am currently still in development on my project (see pictures)  
I am re-creating my own strategy unto automation, using a strict rule-based system with advanced risk-management in place.

This is a trend-following continuation strategy that trades pullbacks within a dominant trend. It uses a top-down, multi-timeframe structure to confirm bias, identify high-probability demand/supply zones, and enter trades after lower-timeframe confirmation.   
It’s a high-discipline, low-frequency, high-RR model. Intention is to evolve this project into a full-automated trading bot.   
  
The bot uses NO indicators, just pure technical analysis. OrcaBot uses 3 different timeframes to analyse automaticly, this ensures the bot knows where the true trends are.   
Why does it need this?: This way of trading, creates more chance op amazing RR returns, and filters out many bad trades. The bot will see when a trend is stalling, reversing or continues.   
When on all 3 timeframes the market is trending, it will enter off a Supply or Demand zone. This to ensure a tight stop loss. and even high profitability when there are less to no runners.

I created a server around this project for various reasons:  
\- To have a hide-out for me and my team to discuss various of things.  
\- For people to join in when they'd have interest in copy trading whenever the system is proven profitable  
\- I share all updates and performance reports there, for everyone to see.  
\- Also i enlighten people with 'lessons' about why and how this strategy works, the way it does.

Now, this system will only run on Ctrader when finished, as my partner, the programmer, is specialized on Ctrader only.  
  
Now comes the reason of my post:  
I would like to expand my team.  
to be clear, i am not perfect, nor is anyone else.   
I still make mistakes and have things wrong. I believe, creating a team in which we can work together, share idea's, help each other out, with people of expertise alongside many different platforms, will not only expand our reach, but will multiply our profits, which we will be sharing through the team.  
  
Our team consists of 3 programmers and 1 moderator for the server right now.  
I am planning to also gather analysts unto the team, to analyze all of our work and bring reports, as this is often the most of the work.
